data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement that customers can review and select a winner from bids. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a homeowner reviews bids and selects a winner, there is no concrete evidence to demonstrate that this process is implemented in the system, leading to a gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that customers can review bids and select a winner.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
